theorem P2_implies_P1 {A : Set X} : P2 A → P1 A := by
  intro h
  have h' : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) := by
    simpa using (Set.interior_subset (s := closure (interior A)))
  exact h.trans h'

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A := A) → Topology.P1 (A := A) := by
  intro h
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P1] at *
  exact Set.Subset.trans h interior_subset
